properties.name: app.admin.bootstrap.enabled
properties.description: Enables secure admin bootstrap from environment variables.

properties.name: app.admin.bootstrap.username
properties.description: Admin username to create or update during bootstrap.

properties.name: app.admin.bootstrap.password
properties.description: Admin password to hash and store during bootstrap.

properties.name: app.security.trusted-proxy-cidrs
properties.description: Exact IPs or CIDR ranges that are allowed to supply forwarded headers.
